title: stelis galeata
intro: Stelis galeata, also known as the 'Mountain Stelis', is a species of orchid native to Central America. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Stelis galeata include reducing swelling, relieving pain, and treating skin infections, as well as its potential use in wound healing and immune system support. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tinctures, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
